theme: A Place You'd Like to Visit

sentences.english: If you could visit any country in the world where would you go?
sentences.korean: 세계 어느 나라든 방문할 수 있다면 어디에 가겠습니까?

sentences.english: If I could visit any country I would choose New Zealand.
sentences.korean: 어느 나라든 방문할 수 있다면 뉴질랜드를 선택하겠어요.

sentences.english: The biggest reason is the stunning natural scenery.
sentences.korean: 가장 큰 이유는 놀라운 자연 경관이에요.

sentences.english: I've always dreamed of seeing the mountains and lakes that appeared in the Lord of the Rings films.
sentences.korean: 반지의 제왕 영화에 나온 산과 호수를 보는 것을 항상 꿈꿔왔어요.

theme: A Place You'd Like to Visit

sentences.english: Also New Zealand is famous for adventure sports like bungee jumping and skydiving.
sentences.korean: 또한 뉴질랜드는 번지 점프와 스카이다이빙 같은 어드벤처 스포츠로 유명해요.

sentences.english: I love outdoor activities so it would be the perfect destination for me.
sentences.korean: 야외 활동을 좋아해서 나에게 완벽한 여행지가 될 거예요.

sentences.english: On top of that the people there are known for being very friendly and welcoming.
sentences.korean: 게다가 그곳 사람들은 매우 친절하고 환대하는 것으로 알려져 있어요.
